arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's George Edmundson transfer admission as Middlesbrough close in on deal
arts.sum: He’d impressed so much on Teesside though that Boro began negotiations with the Premier League outfit over making the loan deal permanent this month, with the 27-year-old out of contract at Portman Road at the end of the season. Asked a couple of days on from the debacle of his late recall if Boro might still try and do a deal with Ipswich, Carrick said on Thursday: “It’s something we’re looking to do.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick's Emmanuel Latte Lath deadline warning after transfer offer to Middlesbrough
arts.sum: Having turned down a deadline-day bid from Ipswich for Latte Lath in the summer, Carrick was asked if Boro would have a deadline again this time, in terms of when they could no longer accept offers. Michael Carrick has suggested Middlesbrough will set a deadline on any potential Emmanuel Latte Lath exit, with the January transfer window now in its final ten days.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough's belief as they allow Micah Hamilton to complete League One loan move
arts.sum: Micah Hamilton has joined League One side Stockport County on loan for the rest of the season, having struggled to make an impact at Middlesbrough so far. Hamilton has moved though, and offering insight into Boro's thinking with the deal, County boss Dave Challinor said: “Micah is a player with huge potential and quality, as seen from the glimpses in Manchester City’s first team.

arts.ttl: Third time lucky as Middlesbrough finally seal Ryan Giles return in loan deal from Hull City
arts.sum: However, it didn't work out for Giles at Kenilworth Road and Giles joined Hull City on loan last January, in a deal that included an obligation for the Tigers to buy him permanently in the summer. Ryan Giles has sealed his return to Middlesbrough, with the left-back joining Boro on loan from Hull City until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Preview: Preston North End vs. Middlesbrough - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Preston North End and Middlesbrough, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Ryan Giles closes in on Middlesbrough return after undergoing medical on Teesside
arts.sum: Boro and Hull City remain in talks but a deal being reached is believed to be extermely close, meaning the Tigers gave the left-back permission to travel to Teesside on Thursday. Ryan Giles is closing in on a return to Middlesbrough after being given permission by Hull City to travel to Teesside on Thursday and complete his medical.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough injury updates with one Boro star 'desperate' to get back and Jonny Howson latest
arts.sum: However, with Tommy Conway now in the latter stages of his rehabilitation programme after suffering a hamstring injury on Boxing Day, Michael Carrick admits the striker is desperate to get back in and around the group. On the squad in general for the weekend, after Luke Ayling and Aidan Morris made their first starts since injury on Tuesday against West Brom, the Boro head coach continued: “We won’t have anyone coming back into the group for Saturday.
